title: High Res Audio remaster of some classic Eva music being sold on morajp
display_title: High Res Audio remaster of some classic Eva music being sold on morajp
wikitext: []: High-Res Audio remaster of some classic Eva music being sold on mora.jp             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Nov 22, 2016 7:42 pm http://mora.jp/package/43000014/KICA286_F/ I bought two of these tracks after I have heard that these were actually "remastered with the supervision of Shiroh Sagisu" and was kinda excited, only to be disappointed with the fact that there was no real remix of the original instrument-samples and that the tracks were victims of the old 'loudness war'. They sound dynamically compressed. Anyone got a catch on these? I'm not even opening a discussion about how high-sampling is mostly pointless for consumers, pwhodges input in this topic would be interesting.

Article: High Res Audio remaster of some classic Eva music being sold on morajp
[]: High-Res Audio remaster of some classic Eva music being sold on mora.jp             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Nov 22, 2016 7:42 pm http://mora.jp/package/43000014/KICA286_F/ I bought two of these tracks after I have heard that these were actually "remastered with the supervision of Shiroh Sagisu" and was kinda excited, only to be disappointed with the fact that there was no real remix of the original instrument-samples and that the tracks were victims of the old 'loudness war'. They sound dynamically compressed. Anyone got a catch on these? I'm not even opening a discussion about how high-sampling is mostly pointless for consumers, pwhodges input in this topic would be interesting.
